check.description: Primary quality gate - runs all checks (static analysis + tests + coverage)
check.when_to_use: Before creating PR, during PR review, before merging

static-check.description: Static analysis only (golangci-lint, shellcheck, license checks)
static-check.when_to_use: Quick check for linting issues without running tests

test.description: Run all unit tests without coverage
test.when_to_use: Quick test verification, debugging specific test failures

tidy-deps.description: Clean up go.mod and verify all dependencies (go mod tidy + go mod verify)
tidy-deps.when_to_use: Fix dependency-related errors, after adding/removing imports

license-headers.description: Auto-add or update SPDX license headers in source files
license-headers.when_to_use: Fix missing or outdated license headers
license-headers.side_effects: Modifies source files to add/update headers

build/cover.html.description: Generate HTML coverage report and open in browser
build/cover.html.when_to_use: Investigate coverage gaps, identify untested code paths

build/cover.out.when_to_use: Generate coverage data for tools or CI pipelines

lint.when_to_use: Focus on Go linting issues, skip other static checks

build.when_to_use: Verify code compiles, test binary locally
build.output: Binary in build/ directory (varies by project)

clean.description: Remove build artifacts and generated files

vendor.description: Vendor all dependencies into vendor/ directory
vendor.when_to_use: Create vendored dependencies for offline builds

download-deps.when_to_use: Pre-fetch dependencies, prepare for offline work

creds.description: Set up credentials for accessing private repositories

vet.description: Run go vet for suspicious constructs
vet.when_to_use: Quick check for common Go mistakes

generate.description: Run go generate to create generated code
generate.when_to_use: After modifying code generation templates or interfaces

docker-build.when_to_use: Test containerized build, prepare for deployment

help.description: Show available make targets and descriptions
help.when_to_use: Discover available targets, learn project commands
